title: UroClysmic 2 Pack Dog Collar for Infection Prevention, Waterproof & Adjustable, Natural Essential Oils, 16-Month Protection, Safe & Comfortable for Dogs Over 7 Weeks
features: 【Long-Lasting Natural Protection】Protect your dog for up to 16 months with our collar, made with natural essential oils. It not only shields your pet but also helps reduce anxiety, providing comfort for both you and your dog. Enjoy peace of mind knowing your pet is protected naturally.

【Fast-Acting & Effective】Our dog collar is crafted with a unique material that stores natural, effective ingredients, gradually releasing them onto your pet's fur and skin. Within just 24 hours of wearing, it starts working, providing continuous protection for your dog. Whether indoors or outdoors, your pet can play freely, knowing they are safely protected without worry.

【Waterproof & Adjustable】Our durable, waterproof dog collar can be worn in the rain or during swimming. It’s designed to fit all dog breeds and sizes, from small to large. The adjustable length allows for a perfect, customized fit, ensuring comfort and security. It can also be worn with a standard collar, allowing your dog to move freely and comfortably.

【Comfortable & Soft】Made from high-quality silicone, our dog collar is soft and comfortable, fitting perfectly around your dog’s neck for all-day wear. The non-greasy formula leaves no residue on your dog’s fur or your hands, making it ideal for daily use. It has a mild plant scent, which can be ventilated for 2 hours if a lighter fragrance is preferred.

【Convenient 2-Pack Dog Collars】This set includes two individually packaged collars, perfect for travel, outdoor adventures, or as a convenient backup. Lightweight and compact, they ensure your dog remains safe and stylish wherever you go, offering peace of mind on every journey.
description: Product description 2 Pack Collar for Dogs Ingredients Silicone Directions Every day See more
